Headline: #95 95th, #108 Halsted/95th and #112 Vincennes/111th Temporary Reroute near 95th/Eggleston
ShortDescription: #95 95th, #108 Halsted/95th and #112 Vincennes/111th buses are temporarily rerouted in both directions due to street blockage near 95th/Eggleston.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
#95 95th, #108 Halsted/95th and #112 Vincennes/111th buses are temporarily rerouted in both directions due to street blockage near 95th/Eggleston.

#95 95th buses will be rerouted in both directions via 95th, Halsted, 87th, Lafayette, 95th and over regular route.

#108 Halsted/95th and #112 Vincennes/111th buses will be rerouted in both directions via Halsted, 87th, Lafayette, 95th and over regular route.

Allow extra travel time.
